category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight text-to-speech engine based on CMU Flite; official GitHub README describes Mimic as Mycroft's TTS engine.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading says Mimic - The Mycroft TTS Engine; source_facts.name is mimic.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo are the official GitHub repository; README includes requirements, platform support, and usage/build guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/MycroftAI/mimic1, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe Mimic as a lightweight text-to-speech engine based on Flite; source_facts.executables includes mimic CLI tools.
